estruturas-ecologicas.title: Ecological Structures
estruturas-ecologicas.description: Our metal roof structures have a low environmental impact and reduce material waste.

maior-economia.title: Greater Savings
maior-economia.description: With excellent cost-benefit at every stage, Tessa structures are economical for your project.

forca-leveza-resistencia.title: Strength, Lightness and Durability
forca-leveza-resistencia.description: Tessa structures have a service life of up to 60 years after assembly, are lighter than wood and easier to install.

maior-produtividade.title: Greater Productivity
maior-produtividade.description: Productivity per installed square meter is up to 3 times higher compared to conventional wood systems.

imune-ataque-cupins.title: Immune to Termite Attack
imune-ataque-cupins.description: Galvanized steel is resistant to termite attack and urban pest proliferation, reducing maintenance costs.

estruturas-duraveis.title: Durable Structures
estruturas-duraveis.description: Structures are produced in galvanized steel with durability exceeding 60 years.

carport.title: Carport
carport.description: Tessa solar carports in galvanized steel: vehicle protection, shade, and clean energy generation with custom-made parts and photovoltaic panels.
carport.metaKeywords: Carport, solar carport, vehicle shelter, galvanized steel, photovoltaic panels, clean energy, metal structure

introSection.title: Customized Solutions for your Projects
introSection.subtitle: Custom-made parts in galvanized steel and industrial cost reduction.

whatIsSection.title: What is a Carport?
whatIsSection.description: A Carport is an innovative solution for parking lots, providing protection and shade for vehicles while simultaneously generating clean energy. The structures are made of galvanized steel and allow for the installation of photovoltaic panels.
whatIsSection.imageAlt: 3D render of a solar carport structure made of galvanized steel with photovoltaic panels for clean energy generation

videoSection.title: Video about the Carport
videoSection.subtitle: Click to get to know our industry and discover details about the production of our Carports.

project-types.title: Does it work for any type of project?
project-types.description: Carports can be installed in commercial and residential projects. They adapt to different spaces and offer easy installation, providing a sustainable solution for parking areas.

benefits.title: What are the benefits of a Carport?
benefits.description: Carports offer a range of benefits. First, by replacing traditional roofing with photovoltaic panels, you embrace the clean energy generation trend. Additionally, it is a durable structure resistant to corrosion, providing shade for vehicles while generating sustainable energy.

beyond-benefits.title: The benefits go even further!
beyond-benefits.description: You will save on energy at the end of the month, reducing your operating costs, and you can use that energy to power your own business or even charge electric vehicles, contributing to a more sustainable future. Solar panels have a long lifespan, averaging 30 years, ensuring decades of savings and clean energy.

clampSection.title: Tessa Panel Mounting Clamp
clampSection.description: A practical and exclusive system where installation is done from below the structure using only two self-drilling screws. It is flexible because it does not require a fixed point on the purlin or PV panel for attachment.
clampSection.imageAlt: Patent seal for the Tessa Panel Mounting Clamp for solar carport

estrutura-de-solo.title: Ground-Mounted Structure
estrutura-de-solo.description: Tessa ground-mounted structures for photovoltaic panel installation: clean and sustainable energy for rural and industrial projects.
estrutura-de-solo.metaKeywords: Ground-mounted structure, photovoltaic structure, solar panels, clean energy, sustainable energy, galvanized steel

introSection.title: Ideal Solutions for your Projects
introSection.subtitle: Tessa has the best solutions for every project.

whatIsSection.title: What are Ground-Mounted Structures?
whatIsSection.description: These structures are designed and developed for mounting photovoltaic panels and generating clean, sustainable energy. They can be easily installed in rural environments, adapting to different spaces and offering a sustainable solution for the countryside.
whatIsSection.imageAlt: 3D render of a Tessa ground-mounted structure for photovoltaic panels in a rural environment

videoSection.title: Renewable Energy for the Countryside
videoSection.subtitle: Structures designed for mounting photovoltaic panels. Watch the video to learn more.

durability.title: How durable are the structures?
durability.description: Ground-mounted structures have an estimated lifespan of up to 60 years after installation. They are produced in galvanized steel, which makes them durable and corrosion-resistant.

benefits.title: What are the benefits?
benefits.description: They offer a range of benefits! First, by using idle spaces for photovoltaic panel installation, you embrace the clean energy generation trend. Additionally, the structures are durable and corrosion-resistant.

beyond-benefits.title: The benefits go even further!
beyond-benefits.description: You will save on energy at the end of the month, reducing your operating costs, and you can use that energy to power your own business, contributing to a more sustainable future. Solar panels have a long lifespan, averaging 30 years, ensuring decades of savings and clean energy.

clampSection.imageAlt: Patent seal for the Tessa Panel Mounting Clamp for ground-mounted structure

estrutura-de-aviario.title: Aviary Structure
estrutura-de-aviario.description: Tessa metal structures for aviaries in galvanized steel: high quality, durability and industrialized assembly for poultry farmers.
estrutura-de-aviario.metaKeywords: Aviary structure, poultry structures, poultry farming, galvanized steel, poultry barn, metal structure

introSection.title: Tessa, Specialist in Structure Projects
introSection.subtitle: High quality and greater durability in your aviary structure.

qualitySection.title: High quality and durability
qualitySection.description: Tessa offers high-quality, durable poultry structures, designed by specialized engineers to optimize resources and costs. Galvanized steel structures guarantee durability of over 60 years and high corrosion resistance. With assembly kits, Tessa provides a complete and economical solution, enabling fast and efficient assembly that saves time and money for poultry farmers.
qualitySection.backgroundImageAlt: Tessa metal aviary structure in a rural setting, illustrating high quality and durability

videoSection.title: Learn more about Poultry Structures
videoSection.subtitle: Click to get to know our industry and discover details about the production of our aviary structures.

benefitsSection.label: Feasibility and benefits of Tessa poultry structures

viability.title: How is project feasibility carried out?
viability.description: Project feasibility is carried out through technical planning by specialized engineers. They study and propose the best solutions, incorporating innovation and technology at every stage.

benefits.title: What are the benefits of Tessa's structure?
benefits.description:
Tessa's aviary structure offers a range of benefits for rural producers in the poultry segment. It is manufactured with high-quality materials, such as galvanized steel, providing durability and strength.

The use of assembly kits by Tessa enables efficient handling and fast structure assembly, which significantly reduces installation costs. This saves time and money for poultry farmers.

In addition, Tessa applies rigorous quality control at every stage of the manufacturing process. The expertise of specialized engineers ensures high-quality projects, offering customers a product with excellent cost-benefit.

estruturas-para-creches.title: Structures for Daycare Centers
estruturas-para-creches.description: Tessa metal covers for daycare centers and schools: galvanized steel, high durability, safety and customized projects for educational institutions.
estruturas-para-creches.metaKeywords: Daycare structures, school covers, daycare centers, schools, galvanized steel, metal structure

introSection.title: Durable Covers for Educational Institutions
introSection.subtitle: High quality that ensures protection and efficiency for daycare centers and schools.

featureSection.title: Tessa Metal Structures
featureSection.subtitle: Technology in every project
featureSection.description: Tessa's structures for daycare centers offer ideal protection and safety for educational environments. Manufactured with high-strength galvanized steel, they are designed to withstand any weather condition and ensure a lifespan of up to 60 years, depending on the region of application and conditions of use. In addition, our covers are lightweight, easy to install and require little maintenance, reducing costs.
featureSection.imageAlt: Tessa metal structures for daycare centers and schools in an educational setting

videoSection.title: Learn more about Covers for Daycare Centers and Schools
videoSection.subtitle: Click to see our completed projects and how Tessa structures offer lasting, efficient protection for educational institutions.
videoSection.playLabel: Play video about daycare and school covers

benefitsSection.label: Feasibility and benefits of Tessa daycare structures
benefitsSection.checklistLabel: Highlights of Tessa covers for daycare centers and schools

viability.title: How is project feasibility carried out?
viability.description: At Tessa, we assess the needs of each daycare center or school to create customized projects that ensure safety and durability, using high-strength galvanized steel. In addition, materials discarded during the manufacturing process are recycled and returned as raw material, promoting a sustainable and efficient production cycle.

benefits.title: What are the benefits of Tessa's structure?
benefits.description:
High Durability: Structures made with galvanized steel that guarantee a lifespan of up to 60 years, withstanding adverse weather conditions and ensuring long-term protection.

Proven Safety: Our projects follow rigorous technical standards, providing complete safety for educational environments.

Sustainability: Materials discarded during production are sent for recycling and return as raw material, contributing to a more sustainable production cycle.

Customization: We develop tailored solutions, adapting each project to the specific needs of each educational institution.

perfis-especiais.title: Special Profiles
perfis-especiais.description: Custom Tessa special profiles in galvanized steel: cold roll forming, made-to-order parts, precision and industrial cost reduction.
perfis-especiais.metaKeywords: Special profiles, custom roll forming, galvanized steel, cold forming, roll former, made-to-order parts

introSection.title: Custom Solutions for Your Projects
introSection.subtitle: Made-to-order parts in galvanized steel and industrial cost reduction.

whatIsSection.title: What is the Special Profile?
whatIsSection.description: They are custom metal parts made on a roll former, in galvanized steel sheet, for special demands, providing precision and reduced setups, lowering costs and raw material waste.
whatIsSection.imageAlt: Rendering of custom Tessa special profiles produced on a roll former with galvanized steel

videoSection.title: Discover Tessa Special Profiles
videoSection.subtitle: Click to get to know our industry and discover details about the production of our Special Profile.

infoCardsSection.label: How Tessa designs, produces and delivers special profiles

design.title: How is it designed?
design.description: Tessa's team of engineers conducts studies and analyses to simplify the roll forming process and enable industrial production, meeting industry-specific needs and allowing ideal project execution.
design.imageAlt: Illustration of the Tessa special profile design process

outsource.title: Why outsource the process?
outsource.description: By outsourcing Special Roll Formed production, your company can optimize processes and achieve better results, eliminating steps with shears, punch presses, laser and press brakes. It also avoids purchasing raw material in sheets or blanks, resulting in additional savings on steel costs.
outsource.imageAlt: Illustration of Tessa special profile manufacturing on a roll former

benefits.title: What are the real benefits?
benefits.description: The Special Profile is the right choice for your business! With custom roll former production, it reduces costs and raw material waste. It eliminates steps and setups, optimizing processes and improving results. It enables innovative projects and generates additional savings on steel prices.
benefits.imageAlt: Illustration of the benefits of Tessa special profiles

processSection.title: Discover the Production Process Steps
processSection.description: Roll forming simplifies Special Profile production by eliminating steps such as shearing, punch pressing, laser cutting and press braking. This saves on raw material purchases and reduces waste, making the process more efficient and economical.

identify.title: Identify your needs
identify.description: The Tessa team works with you to understand your needs and the functionality of the Special Roll Formed profile.
identify.iconAlt: Step 1 icon: identify special profile needs

study.title: Project study and analysis
study.description: Our engineers conduct detailed studies to find the best way to produce your Special Roll Formed profile.
study.iconAlt: Step 2 icon: special profile project study and analysis

production.title: Special Roll Formed production
production.description: After project approval, the Special Roll Formed profile goes into production.
production.iconAlt: Step 3 icon: special roll formed production

comparisonSection.title: Special Profile VS Common Profile
comparisonSection.subtitle: Discover the advantages of the Tessa Special Roll Formed profile compared to conventional profiles.
